---
title: "rgexf sigma.js demo"
author: "George G. Vega Yon"
date: "May 4, 2026"
format: html
---

Interactive graph rendering with [sigma.js](https://www.sigmajs.org/).

```{r}
library(rgexf)
```

Default graph (Les Misérables):

```{r}
sigmajs()
```

From a `gexf` object:

```{r}
path  <- system.file("gexf-graphs/lesmiserables.gexf", package = "rgexf")
graph <- read.gexf(path)
plot(graph)
```
